creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like a log for `make build`, not `make cabal-extract-deps`.

I presume `make cabal-extract-deps` completed successfully? In this case, you just missed `make make-use-cabal-revs` after `make make-use-cabal`. See https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/building.html#cabal-ex1
